rationale: The cited paper appears as part of a grouped citation in a background discussion about coding delays as losses, alongside Kahneman and Tversky (1984). In the citing paper, it is not used to build specific hypotheses, operationalizations, or analyses tied to Novemsky and Kahneman's boundary conditions. The core contribution and experiments focus on time-interval description effects in discounting, so this citation functions as general conceptual support rather than a distinct substantive dependency.
